summary: Phase 2 testing complete. Backend: 20/20 pytest passed including real Replicate flux-2-klein-9b /generate/pro (18cr deducted, image returned) and /generate/artistic (13cr), real /generate/carousel 2-slide flow (16cr), wizard/compose + suggest via gpt-4o-mini (6 prompts), settings persistence (lang propagated to users.lang), explore + toggle-public, public lists confirm 20 pro_presets / 33 artistic_styles / 44 poster_templates / 5 wizard_steps, video/poster validation (400 on short prompt / unknown template), NSFW keyword detector, rate-limit: admin bypassed for 35 rapid calls, user hit 429 within 35 rapid /suggest calls. Frontend: login OK, dashboard sidebar shows all 14 nav links (generate, pro, artistic, video, posters, carousel, wizard, suggest, gallery, favorites, billing, settings, profile, referrals) plus admin for admin user. All 8 new routes (/app/{pro,artistic,video,posters,carousel,wizard,suggest,settings}) plus /explore load without crashes or errors. Wizard progresses through all 5 questions and shows composed prompt. Suggest fetches and renders 6 clickable prompt cards. Settings page accepts changes + saves, i18n switches sidebar language live (PT/EN). Pro/Artistic pages render upload zone, presets/styles grid, and disabled generate button. Posters/Carousel render their controls. Explore page renders without errors.

issues: Browser tab title remains generic 'Emergent | Fullstack App' on every route — consider per-page <title> (e.g. 'Remake Pixel — Wizard') for SEO/UX.

action_items: Optional: add per-page document.title for the new dashboard routes.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py has grown to ~784 lines and now bundles auth, credits, generation (6 modes), wizard, suggest, settings, explore, stripe and admin. Strong candidate to split into routers/ (auth, credits, generation, admin, public).
Rate-limit is in-memory (services/rate_limit.py) and per-process — will desync if backend is scaled horizontally. Move to Redis or DB-backed sliding window before scaling.

NSFW gating in /generate/pro and /generate/artistic passes prompt=None to _pre_generate_checks, so NSFW auto-rewrite never runs on these endpoints (only on /video and /carousel). Acceptable for image-from-photo modes, but worth documenting.

In /generate/poster, _pre_generate_checks is called with prompt=None before placeholder format — so explicit text inside placeholders bypasses NSFW. Consider sanitizing placeholders or running rewrite_safe on the final composed prompt.

services/replicate_service.py opens uploaded files in _run thread but only closes them after run() returns; if replicate keeps a long-running poll the FD lives that long — fine for now but worth noting.

/generate/pro and /generate/artistic compute new_balance via _pre_generate_checks then re-spend in _spend_credits but the intermediate `_, _` from _pre_generate_checks discards the user object; harmless but a minor inefficiency (two DB reads of user when one would do).

POSTER prompt builder falls back to `f"({k})"` for missing placeholders, so the endpoint will happily generate posters with literal '(brand_name)' baked into the prompt. Consider 422 if required placeholders are empty.

Frontend Layout.jsx has 15-link sidebar — works, but on smaller laptop heights the list overflows; sticky logo header + scroll is in place but density is high. Consider grouping (Create / Library / Account).

data-testid coverage is good on Layout/Wizard/Suggest/Settings. Pro/Artistic/Posters/Carousel/Video pages would benefit from data-testid on their primary Generate button and the photo dropzone to enable robust automation.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@remakepix.com / Admin@2026Remake. User: test@remakepix.com / Test@2026Remake — credits topped up to ~100 at test start; ended around 50 (84 visible mid-test before carousel). Lang reset to 'pt' at test end.
seed_data_creation: Admin top-up of test user credits via /api/admin/credits/adjust to ensure enough balance for Pro+Artistic+Carousel real generations. 3 real Replicate creations created on test@remakepix.com (1 pro ultra_real, 1 artistic oil_paint, 1 carousel 2-slide). 1 creation toggled public (will appear in /explore).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 backend + frontend fully validated. Real Replicate flux-2-klein-9b is live and working for pro/artistic. /generate/video and /generate/poster were intentionally NOT executed end-to-end (cost/time) — only validation paths. Rate-limit test fires 35 rapid calls and reliably trips 429; subsequent test runs within the 60s window may need ~60s cooldown for the test user. test user credits run down with each real run — admin top-up via POST /api/admin/credits/adjust before re-running pro/artistic/carousel suites.
